name: Syam Prakash Raj Vemuri
title: DevOps Engineer
professional_summary: 4+ years of expertise in Cloud (Azure, AWS) and DevOps, delivering scalable, fault-tolerant solutions.
Proficient in designing and implementing Azure and AWS services for hybrid/private cloud configurations.
Automated infrastructure and application deployments using Ansible, Terraform, and CI/CD tools (Jenkins, Azure DevOps).
Experience with container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes, AKS) and microservices architecture.
Secured cloud environments with Azure AD, encryption, and monitoring tools (Application Insights, CloudTrail).
Managed Linux/Windows systems, database deployments, and artifact management in Agile environments.
Skilled in virtualization, source control, and troubleshooting secure, high-performance infrastructure.
Collaborative and motivated with strong communication skills, driving projects with a sense of ownership.

responsibilities: Led the migration of on-premises retail applications to Azure Cloud using ARM and Terraform templates, ensuring scalability and security.
Deployed Azure IaaS VMs and PaaS Cloud services within secure VNets and subnets.
Visualized resource provisioning plans using Terraform Graph and ensured smooth execution.
Configured and managed Azure Automation scripts for various Azure services, improving operational efficiency.
Developed CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps for zero-downtime deployments and high customer satisfaction.
Implemented AKS for container orchestration, enhancing application scaling and performance.
Deployed microservices-based applications on AKS with Ingress API Gateway and Nginx reverse proxy.
Secured environments using Azure AD Connect, ADFS authentication, and VM disk encryption with KEK keys.
Designed and automated Azure Disaster Recovery solutions using Recovery Vault and PowerShell scripts.
Managed retail data migration to Azure using Azure Data Factory, integrating MySQL, SQL, and Cosmos DB.
Set up a Continuous Delivery pipeline using Docker, GitHub, and AWS for automated deployment and testing of healthcare applications.
Configured instances behind AWS ELB for high availability and fault tolerance.
Managed S3 Buckets for storage and RDS databases with automated backups to S3 for data security.
Tuned Redshift tables for performance and conducted data validation using Python.
Installed and configured Ansible on AWS EC2 instances, automating deployments with AWS CLI, Python, and CloudFormation.
Automated cost management using Ansible Playbooks for auto-start/stop of AWS resources, triggered by Jenkins.
Integrated data from multiple sources into AWS S3, RDS, and Redshift for streamlined data management.
Configured and optimized Linux-based environments for high-performance healthcare applications.
Automated AWS environment creation using CloudFormation, AWS CLI, and Shell/Python scripts.
Virtualized servers and built Docker images, utilizing AWS SMS, DMS, and Snowball for migrations.
Designed and implemented an Azure Data Factory-based Ingestion Framework with Azure SQL Database and Data Warehouse for efficient data processing and storage.
Automated infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible for Azure VM/server management and configuration automation.
Built Jenkins CI/CD pipelines using Python and shell scripts for package distribution and deployment to Tomcat.
Managed Docker ecosystems, including Slave Nodes, Swarm orchestration, and image management in Registry/Hub.
Orchestrated containerized environments with Kubernetes, utilizing Helm charts and global deployment models.
Automated server builds, containerization, and deployments, while developing JIRA project workflows and permission schemes.
Troubleshot platform components for large-scale applications using Kubernetes, OpenShift, and Cloud Foundry.
Automated cloud infrastructure deployments on AWS using Code Pipeline and CloudFormation templates, designing custom VPCs, subnets, and database solutions.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, integrating AWS Lambda and S3 for artifact storage.
Deployed microservices to Docker registries, utilizing Bitbucket and Gradle for source control and build automation.
Configured AWS Route 53 for multi-region traffic routing and secured cloud environments with Security Groups and server hardening practices.
Managed container orchestration using Kubernetes clusters and AWS ECS, constructing Docker images for middleware configurations.
Monitored Kubernetes clusters using Prometheus and Grafana, ensuring robust cloud security and performance.
Secured the AWS root account and enforced post-provisioning security best practices for compliance and risk reduction.
